text.title: Business Model Research Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Canvas blocks empty/missing; archetypes_shortlist has duplicates and >2 entries; verdict is not one of viable/viable-with-fixes/not-viable; required keys unit_economics, stress_tests, assumptions_ledger absent.

list.pattern: Using blended CAC instead of paid CAC inside LTV:CAC.
Single churn number applied to all months; month-1 churn must be tracked separately.
Treating revenue as profit by skipping the Cost Structure block.
